# https://www.gzchanfer.com/robots.txt
# Generated by CHANFER website

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block private/admin paths
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /tmp/

# Block low-value parameter URLs
Disallow: /*?*sort=
Disallow: /*?*filter=
Disallow: /*?*utm_

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://www.gzchanfer.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl delay (be polite)
# Crawl-delay: 1
